source_rationale: PRG4 (proteoglycan 4/lubricin) is a marker of mesenchymal progenitor cells in adipose tissue
Fibrillin-1 is an extracellular matrix gene characteristic of adipocyte precursor/stromal cells
PI16 is a well-established marker of universal fibroblast/adipocyte progenitor populations
Microfibril-associated protein 5 marks mesenchymal stromal/adipocyte precursor cells
IGFBP5 is involved in IGF signaling and is highly expressed in adipose progenitor cells
SFRP4 is a Wnt signaling modulator enriched in adipose-derived stromal/precursor cells
Follistatin-like 1 is a secreted glycoprotein characteristic of mesenchymal progenitor cells
Immunoglobulin kappa constant region is a hallmark of B cell/plasma cell immunoglobulin production
CD79A is a canonical B cell marker forming part of the B cell receptor signaling complex
MS4A1 (CD20) is a definitive B cell surface marker used clinically for B cell identification
J chain is essential for polymeric immunoglobulin assembly in antibody-secreting B cells
IgM heavy chain is expressed by naive and memory B cells as part of the B cell receptor
Immunoglobulin lambda constant 2 reflects active immunoglobulin production by B lineage cells
T cell receptor gamma constant 2 is a defining marker of gamma delta T cells
CD7 is a T/NK cell marker highly expressed on gamma delta T cells
KLRC2 (NKG2C) is an activating NK receptor expressed on gamma delta T cell subsets
XCL1 (lymphotactin) is a chemokine characteristically produced by gamma delta T cells
Amphiregulin is produced by tissue-resident gamma delta T cells for tissue repair functions
Granulysin is a cytolytic effector molecule characteristic of cytotoxic T lymphocytes
Granzyme B is a key cytotoxic effector protease in CD8+ cytotoxic T cells
Granzyme H is a serine protease enriched in terminally differentiated cytotoxic CD8+ T cells
CD8A is the canonical surface marker defining CD8+ T cells
Perforin is essential for cytotoxic granule-mediated killing by CD8+ T cells
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein highly expressed in effector CD8+ T cells
KLRD1 (CD94) is an NK receptor expressed on cytotoxic effector CD8+ T cells
FGFBP2 is a marker of highly cytotoxic effector CD8+ T cells and NK cells
Claudin-5 is a tight junction protein and canonical endothelial cell marker
Von Willebrand factor is a classic endothelial cell marker involved in hemostasis
SPARCL1 is highly expressed in vascular endothelial cells
CAVIN2 is a caveolae-associated protein enriched in endothelial cells
APOLD1 is an endothelial cell-specific gene involved in vascular function
BTNL9 is preferentially expressed in capillary endothelial cells
Granulysin is expressed in NK cells as a cytotoxic effector molecule
CMC1 is enriched in NK cell populations and marks immature NK developmental stages
Granzyme K is characteristic of immature/transitional NK cells
KLRC1 (NKG2A) is an inhibitory receptor marking immature NK cells
XCL2 is a chemokine produced by NK cells, especially during early activation
CD2 is an adhesion molecule expressed on NK cells important for target cell recognition
IL-1β is a key pro-inflammatory cytokine produced by classically activated macrophages
CXCL3 is a pro-inflammatory chemokine secreted by activated macrophages
CXCL2 (MIP-2α) is a neutrophil-recruiting chemokine from inflammatory macrophages
CXCL8 (IL-8) is a hallmark inflammatory chemokine produced by activated macrophages
CCL20 is an inflammatory chemokine produced by macrophages to recruit immune cells
SOD2 is upregulated in inflammatory macrophages as part of the oxidative stress response
BCL2A1 is an NF-κB-regulated anti-apoptotic gene in activated inflammatory macrophages
KLRB1 (CD161) is a canonical marker broadly expressed across innate lymphoid cells
TNFRSF18 (GITR) is highly expressed on ILCs and involved in their activation
TNFRSF4 (OX40) is expressed on activated ILCs and regulates their function
GATA3 is a master transcription factor for ILC2 and broadly marks ILC populations
Amphiregulin is a tissue-repair effector molecule characteristically produced by ILCs
IL-32 is a pro-inflammatory cytokine expressed by ILC1s
XCL1 is a chemokine produced by ILC1s for immune cell recruitment
IL-7 receptor is essential for ILC1 development and survival
Integrin beta-1 is involved in ILC1 tissue residency and migration
ETS1 is a transcription factor important for ILC1 development and function
IL1RL1 (ST2/IL-33 receptor) is a canonical ILC2 marker essential for IL-33 responsiveness
RORA is a key transcription factor required for ILC2 development
HPGD (prostaglandin dehydrogenase) is highly expressed in ILC2s for prostaglandin metabolism
KLRB1 (CD161) is a surface marker expressed on ILC2s
SLAMF1 is a surface receptor enriched on ILC2s involved in cell-cell interactions
IL-7 receptor is critical for ILC2 homeostasis and survival
KIT (CD117) is a canonical surface marker of ILC3s
CCR6 is a chemokine receptor that defines the LTi-like ILC3 subset
IL-7 receptor is essential for ILC3 development and maintenance
Lymphotoxin beta is characteristically expressed by ILC3s, especially LTi-like cells
SPRY1 is a signaling modulator enriched in ILC3 populations
IL-7 receptor is critical for innate lymphoid precursor survival and differentiation
GITR is expressed on ILC precursors and marks early ILC development
OX40 is expressed on ILC precursors during early differentiation
SELL (CD62L) marks circulating/precursor lymphoid cells with homing capacity
XCL1 is produced by ILC precursors and early innate lymphoid cells
FABP4 is a fatty acid binding protein highly expressed in lipid-laden macrophages
FABP5 is a lipid chaperone enriched in lipid-associated macrophages
APOE is a canonical marker of lipid-associated macrophages involved in lipid efflux
APOC1 is an apolipoprotein characteristic of lipid-handling macrophages
SPP1 (osteopontin) is a hallmark gene of lipid-associated macrophages in adipose tissue
LIPA (lysosomal acid lipase) is essential for lipid metabolism in lipid-associated macrophages
GPNMB is a glycoprotein marker of lipid-associated macrophages in metabolic tissues
CD36 is a scavenger receptor for lipid uptake, defining lipid-associated macrophages
Granulysin is a major cytotoxic effector molecule in mature NK cells
Granzyme B is a key cytotoxic protease in mature effector NK cells
FGFBP2 is a marker of terminally differentiated cytotoxic NK cells (CD56dim)
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein highly expressed in mature NK cells
KLRD1 (CD94) is a canonical NK cell receptor marking mature NK cells
SPON2 is specifically expressed in mature cytotoxic NK cells and aids in target recognition
KLRB1 (CD161) is a canonical surface marker of MAIT cells
IL-7 receptor is highly expressed on MAIT cells for their homeostatic maintenance
RORA is a transcription factor important for MAIT cell development and function
Granzyme K is characteristically expressed by MAIT cells
MYBL1 is a transcription factor enriched in MAIT cells
Lysozyme is a canonical myeloid lineage marker
S100A9 is a myeloid-specific alarmin and marker of myeloid cells
IL-1β is a pro-inflammatory cytokine produced by myeloid cells
CXCL8 (IL-8) is a chemokine characteristically produced by myeloid cells
Epiregulin is produced by activated myeloid cells
Thrombospondin-1 is expressed by myeloid cells and involved in inflammation
IL-7 receptor (CD127) is a canonical marker of naive CD4+ T cells
CD40 ligand (CD154) is a canonical CD4+ T cell marker for T-B cell interactions
MAF is a transcription factor involved in CD4+ T cell differentiation
CD2 is a T cell surface marker expressed on naive CD4+ T cells
CXCR4 is a chemokine receptor expressed on naive T cells for lymph node homing
CD8A is the canonical marker defining CD8+ T cells
Granzyme K is characteristic of early effector/naive-like CD8+ T cells
CCL5 (RANTES) is expressed by activated CD8+ T cells
CD8B is a co-receptor subunit specific to conventional CD8+ T cells
CRTAM is an activation marker on CD8+ T cells involved in cytotoxicity
XCL2 is a chemokine highly produced by NK-like lymphocytes
XCL1 (lymphotactin) is characteristically secreted by NK-like cells
KLRC1 (NKG2A) is an inhibitory NK receptor marking NK-like cells
CMC1 is enriched in NK-like cell populations
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein expressed by NK-like cells
Cathepsin W is a cysteine protease specifically expressed in NK and NK-like cells
S100A9 (calgranulin B) is a canonical neutrophil marker forming calprotectin
S100A8 (calgranulin A) is a canonical neutrophil marker and alarmin
Versican is highly expressed in neutrophils and involved in inflammation
SERPINB2 (PAI-2) is expressed by activated neutrophils
G0S2 is highly expressed in neutrophils and regulates their survival
Thrombospondin-1 is released by activated neutrophils
LST1 is a canonical marker of nonclassical monocytes
AIF1 (IBA1) is a monocyte/macrophage marker enriched in nonclassical monocytes
C5AR1 is a complement receptor expressed on monocytes
FCER1G is an Fc receptor signaling component expressed on monocytes
Cathepsin S is a protease enriched in nonclassical monocytes for antigen processing
SERPINA1 (alpha-1 antitrypsin) is produced by monocytes
RNASE1 is a hallmark gene of perivascular/tissue-resident macrophages
C1QA is a complement component canonically expressed by tissue-resident macrophages
C1QC is part of the complement C1q complex marking tissue-resident macrophages
LYVE1 is a canonical marker of perivascular macrophages in multiple tissues
Selenoprotein P is highly expressed in tissue-resident perivascular macrophages
C1QB is a complement gene characteristic of perivascular macrophages
Legumain is a lysosomal protease enriched in tissue-resident macrophages
Apolipoprotein D is highly expressed in preadipocytes and adipose stromal cells
CXCL14 is a chemokine enriched in preadipocytes and adipose tissue stroma
CFD (adipsin) is a canonical adipocyte/preadipocyte marker involved in complement activation
Glypican-3 is expressed in preadipocytes and regulates adipogenesis
CXCL12 (SDF-1) is produced by preadipocytes and adipose stromal cells
Matrix Gla protein is expressed in preadipocytes and mesenchymal cells
Gelsolin is enriched in preadipocytes and involved in cytoskeletal remodeling during differentiation
CTLA-4 is a canonical Treg marker essential for their suppressive function
BATF is a transcription factor important for Treg differentiation and function
TIGIT is an inhibitory receptor highly expressed on regulatory T cells
RTKN2 is a recently identified marker specifically enriched in regulatory T cells
HPGD is involved in prostaglandin catabolism and is enriched in Tregs
IL-32 is expressed by activated Tregs in tissue contexts
ACTA2 (alpha-smooth muscle actin) is a canonical smooth muscle cell marker
Transgelin (SM22) is a canonical smooth muscle cell marker
RGS5 is a pericyte/smooth muscle cell marker regulating G-protein signaling
Periostin is expressed by smooth muscle cells and involved in ECM remodeling
IGFBP7 is expressed by pericytes and smooth muscle cells in the vasculature
ADIRF is enriched in smooth muscle cells and pericytes
Granzyme K is characteristic of tissue-resident NK cells
CCL5 is produced by tissue-resident NK cells for immune cell recruitment
KLRC1 (NKG2A) is an inhibitory receptor marking tissue-resident NK cells
Granzyme A is a cytotoxic protease expressed by tissue-resident NK cells
ALOX5AP is involved in leukotriene synthesis in tissue-resident NK cells
CEMIP2 is enriched in tissue-resident NK cells
MHC class II molecule highly expressed on cDC1s for antigen presentation
MHC class II molecule characteristic of professional antigen-presenting cDC1s
CPVL is a carboxypeptidase specifically enriched in cDC1 dendritic cells
CD74 (invariant chain) is essential for MHC II antigen presentation in dendritic cells
MHC class II alpha chain highly expressed on type 1 dendritic cells
Versican is highly expressed in classical monocytes
Ficolin-1 is a canonical marker of classical (CD14+) monocytes
Lysozyme is a myeloid marker highly expressed in classical monocytes
CD163 is a scavenger receptor expressed on classical monocytes and macrophages
MS4A6A is a membrane-spanning protein enriched in monocytes
S100A9 is highly expressed in inflammatory/classical monocytes
S100A8 is a calgranulin marking inflammatory monocytes
Ficolin-1 is a canonical monocyte marker
Versican is expressed by monocytes, especially inflammatory subsets
SLC11A1 (NRAMP1) is a divalent metal transporter in monocytes/macrophages
CCR7 is a chemokine receptor marking migratory/mature dendritic cells
LAMP3 (DC-LAMP) is a canonical marker of mature/activated dendritic cells
CCL22 is a chemokine produced by mature dendritic cells to recruit T cells
CCL17 is a chemokine characteristically produced by cDC2a dendritic cells
BIRC3 is an NF-κB target gene upregulated in activated/mature dendritic cells
HLA-DRA is an MHC class II molecule highly expressed on cDC2b cells

IL1R2 is a decoy receptor enriched in cDC2b dendritic cells
CD74 is the MHC II invariant chain essential for antigen presentation in DCs
HLA-DQA1 is an MHC class II gene highly expressed on cDC2b cells
